CREATE TABLE bpel_scripts (id int PRIMARY KEY, script_path varchar(255), name varchar(100));
INSERT INTO bpel_scripts (id, script_path, name) VALUES (1, 'file:/echo/bpel.xml', 'Echo');
CREATE TABLE wsdl_definitions (id int PRIMARY KEY, script_id int, wsdl_path varchar(255), FOREIGN KEY (script_id) REFERENCES bpel_scripts(id));
INSERT INTO wsdl_definitions (id, script_id, wsdl_path) VALUES (1, 1, 'file:/echo/wsdl.xml');
CREATE PROCEDURE echo_deploy () { DECLARE scp int; BPEL.BPEL.import_script ('file:/echo/bpel.xml', 'Echo', scp); BPEL.BPEL.compile_script (scp, '/Echo'); };

CREATE PROCEDURE multi_deploy () { DECLARE scp1 int; DECLARE scp2 int; BPEL.BPEL.import_script ('file:/process/first.bpel', 'FirstProcess', scp1); BPEL.BPEL.import_script ('file:/process/second.bpel', 'SecondProcess', scp2); BPEL.BPEL.compile_script (scp1, '/FirstProcess'); BPEL.BPEL.compile_script (scp2, '/SecondProcess'); };

CREATE PROCEDURE conditional_compile () { DECLARE scp int; BPEL.BPEL.import_script ('file:/conditional/process.bpel', 'ConditionalProcess', scp); IF (scp IS NOT NULL) THEN BPEL.BPEL.compile_script (scp, '/ConditionalProcess'); END IF; };

CREATE PROCEDURE nested_compile () { DECLARE scp int; DECLARE ws_id int; BPEL.BPEL.import_script ('file:/nested/script.bpel', 'NestedScript', scp); SET ws_id = (SELECT id FROM wsdl_definitions WHERE script_id = (SELECT id FROM bpel_scripts WHERE name = 'NestedScript')); BPEL.BPEL.compile_script (scp, CONCAT('/NestedScript/', ws_id)); };
CREATE VIEW active_bpel_scripts AS SELECT b.id, b.name FROM bpel_scripts b JOIN wsdl_definitions w ON b.id = w.script_id WHERE w.wsdl_path IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO bpel_scripts (id, script_path, name) VALUES (2, 'file:/another/script.bpel', 'AnotherScript');

CREATE PROCEDURE compile_all () { DECLARE scp int; FOR rec IN SELECT * FROM bpel_scripts LOOP BPEL.BPEL.import_script (rec.script_path, rec.name, scp); BPEL.BPEL.compile_script (scp, CONCAT('/', rec.name)); END LOOP; };
